title: Listening - Part 3
instructions: Complete the notes with a word or short phrase.

content.speaker: Chloe
content.audio_script:
Hello everyone. My name’s Chloe, and today I’m going to tell you about a music workshop.

The project first started at the [1]music teacher[/1], where a group of students wanted to learn something new after school. 
At first, only a few people joined, but more students became interested very quickly.

We usually meet on [2]small theatre[/2], because that’s when most people are free. 
Everyone is encouraged to bring [3]guitar lessons[/3] or any equipment they already have at home.

During breaks, students often visit the nearby [4]lunchtime break[/4] together to relax and chat. 
At the end of the course, all participants can share their work in an [5]school website[/5], which friends and family can visit.

Personally, I think the best part of the experience is [6]performing live[/6], because it helps students become more confident and creative.

Thanks for listening.

dialogue.speaker: chloe
dialogue.text:
Hello everyone. My name’s Chloe, and today I’m going to tell you about a music workshop.

The project first started at the music teacher, where a group of students wanted to learn something new after school. 
At first, only a few people joined, but more students became interested very quickly.

We usually meet on small theatre, because that’s when most people are free. 
Everyone is encouraged to bring guitar lessons or any equipment they already have at home.

During breaks, students often visit the nearby lunchtime break together to relax and chat. 
At the end of the course, all participants can share their work in an school website, which friends and family can visit.

Personally, I think the best part of the experience is performing live, because it helps students become more confident and creative.

Thanks for listening.
